name: Dry Martini 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a mixing glass with ice.
2. Add the gin and dry vermouth to the mixing glass.
3. Stir gently until well chilled, about 30 seconds.
4. Strain into a chilled martini glass filled with ice.
5. Garnish with an olive on a cocktail pick.
6. Serve immediately.
